item.title: Working at Ulta Beauty as a Prestige Beauty Advisor: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: An in-depth look at the Prestige Beauty Advisor role at Ulta Beauty, including pay rates, daily responsibilities, and real employee feedback.
